title: hieracium acutifolium subsp. villarsii
intro: Hieracium acutifolium subsp. villarsii is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, a flowering perennial that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, and is often used to treat conditions such as arthritis and gastrointestinal issues. Hieracium acutifolium subsp. villarsii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
